tasks.label: Fluxo: 1) Check
tasks.detail: Checagem geral de seguranca e organizacao (nao sobe nada).

tasks.label: Fluxo: 3) Release Check
tasks.detail: Valida se esta pronto para subir producao (passo obrigatorio).

tasks.label: Fluxo: 4) Prod Up
tasks.detail: Sobe producao pelo caminho oficial e seguro.

tasks.label: Fluxo: 5) Status
tasks.detail: Mostra status dos servicos e saude do ambiente.

tasks.label: Fluxo: Completo (1->5)
tasks.detail: Executa toda a sequencia oficial, em ordem.

tasks.label: Fluxo: Assistente Release Seguro
tasks.detail: Prepara blocos de commit, pede confirmacao e so faz push final com sua autorizacao.

tasks.label: Fluxo: Assistente Release (Executar Commit+Push)
tasks.detail: Executa o assistente no modo de execucao (commit e push), com confirmacoes de seguranca.

tasks.label: Teste: WhatsApp Handoffs Pending
args: $token = 'eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiIxIiwianRpIjoiMjU3NDJiMzYtYzFiNy00ZTM2LWJiZDgtNGQ1YmZmN2VlOWE0IiwidGVuYW50X2lkIjoiN2JlOGRhZDctODk1Ni00NzU4LWI3YmMtODU1YTUyNTlmZTJiIiwiZXhwIjoxNzc0MTU2MDk0fQ.1260p7lID4cF-c2uJ7mC2m8EktoK3Okc7D0mqfVuxoI'; try { $resp = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost:8000/whatsapp/handoffs/pending' -Headers @{ Authorization = "Bearer $token" } -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 15; Write-Output ('STATUS=' + [int]$resp.StatusCode); Write-Output $resp.Content } catch { if ($_.Exception.Response) { Write-Output ('STATUS=' + [int]$_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__); $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader($_.Exception.Response.GetResponseStream()); $reader.ReadToEnd() } else { $_ | Out-String } }

tasks.label: Teste: WhatsApp Handoffs Pending Python
args: import requests; headers={'Authorization':'Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiIxIiwianRpIjoiMjU3NDJiMzYtYzFiNy00ZTM2LWJiZDgtNGQ1YmZmN2VlOWE0IiwidGVuYW50X2lkIjoiN2JlOGRhZDctODk1Ni00NzU4LWI3YmMtODU1YTUyNTlmZTJiIiwiZXhwIjoxNzc0MTU2MDk0fQ.1260p7lID4cF-c2uJ7mC2m8EktoK3Okc7D0mqfVuxoI'}; r=requests.get('http://localhost:8000/whatsapp/handoffs/pending', headers=headers, timeout=15); print('STATUS=' + str(r.status_code)); print(r.text)

tasks.label: Teste: WhatsApp Handoffs Pending Python 2
args: import requests; token="eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiIxIiwianRpIjoiMjU3NDJiMzYtYzFiNy00ZTM2LWJiZDgtNGQ1YmZmN2VlOWE0IiwidGVuYW50X2lkIjoiN2JlOGRhZDctODk1Ni00NzU4LWI3YmMtODU1YTUyNTlmZTJiIiwiZXhwIjoxNzc0MTU2MDk0fQ.1260p7lID4cF-c2uJ7mC2m8EktoK3Okc7D0mqfVuxoI"; r=requests.get("http://localhost:8000/whatsapp/handoffs/pending", headers={"Authorization": f"Bearer {token}"}, timeout=15); print("STATUS=" + str(r.status_code)); print(r.text)
